category_sources: Official bit.dev and teambit/bit describe Bit as a platform/tooling for reusable components and modular development.
source_facts.description says Bit is a distributed code component manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bit; official bit.dev and teambit GitHub branding use Bit.
docs_sources: Official bit.dev documentation and reference pages are the dedicated documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: Official Team Bit GitHub organization identifies teambit/bit as the Bit repository and links it to bit.dev.
tags_sources: Official teambit/bit repository topics and README emphasize components, modular apps, TypeScript, and monorepo workflows.
source_facts.description and current_curation.tags identify CLI component management.
